price: Nein! Vielmehr Allah (allein) sollst du dienen und zu den Dankbaren sollst du gehören.
arabic: بَلِ ٱللَّهَ فَٱعۡبُدۡ وَكُن مِّنَ ٱلشَّٰكِرِينَ

version.title: German Translation - Bubenheim
version.description: Translation of the Quran meanings into German by Abdullah As-Samit (Frank Bubenheim) and Dr. Nadeem Elyas

meta.transliteration: bali al-laha fa-uʿ'bud wakun mina al-shākirīna
